# EZ Mart E-Commerce Platform

EZ Mart is a high-performance, modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js, React, TailwindCSS, and Supabase.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js (App Router), React, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Next.js API Routes (/api/*)
- Database: Supabase

## Key Pages
- Home (/): Featured products, categories catalog, best sellers.
- Products (/products): Full categories list and scroll-based loaded catalogues.
- Product Details (/products/[category]/[slug]): Comprehensive specs, image galleries, user reviews.
- Cart (/cart): Shopping bag items management.
- Wishlist (/wishlist): Saved user favorites.
- Profile (/profile): Shipping addresses, billing details, and personal attributes.

## Developer & Agent Guideline
- Base URL: https://ezmart.in
- Sitemaps index: https://ezmart.in/sitemap.xml
- API routes are located under /api/
